docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER HENRY WYKOWSKI'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING MEDIATION AND IF MEDIATION FAILS ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF A MEDIATOR OR ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-27-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER HENRY WYKOWSKI'S RE-NOTICED PETITION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING MEDIATION AND, IF MEDIATION FAILS, ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF A MEDIATOR OR ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE ORDER GRANTING THE PETITION SIGNED ON JUNE 5, 2012 IS VACATED. BECAUSE OF THE RE-NOTICE FILED ON MAY 30, 2012, THE PETITION SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN HEARD ON THAT DATE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Re Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order Compelling Mediation And If Mediation Fails Arbitration And For Appointment Of A Mediator Or Arbitrator And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER HENRY WYKOWSKI'S Re-Noticed Petition For An Order Compelling Mediation And, If Mediation Fails, Arbitration And For Appointment Of A Mediator Or Arbitrator is Granted. No opposition filed. The Order Granting the Petition signed on June 5, 2012 is vacated. Because of the re-notice filed on May 30, 2012, the Petition should not have been heard on that date. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
